/usr/bin/ar qc /home/nvidia/catkin_ws00/devel/lib/libnmea.a  CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/gga.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/gll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/gsa.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/gsv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/parse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/rmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/sentence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/vtg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nmea.dir/src/zda.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib /home/nvidia/catkin_ws00/devel/lib/libnmea.a
